description: Starter benchmark manifest for external agents executing the Deep Research Runtime deep-research skill family on real Example Retail warehouse data.

cases.user_prompt: Q4 交易额 比 Q3 下降了吗？
cases.success_standard: Agent first validates the Q3 vs Q4 交易额 headline against gold before making any driver claim.

cases.user_prompt: 为什么 Example Retail 2025 Q4 交易额 比 Q3 下降？主要是谁驱动的？
cases.success_standard: Agent matches gold headline direction and magnitude band, identifies accepted primary negative driver, and separates demand, value, and structure evidence.

cases.user_prompt: 示例设备 A-001 最近 30 天收入下降，原因是什么？
cases.success_standard: Agent isolates machine A-001, compares recent 30 days with the previous 30 days, and identifies whether the drop is driven by demand, value, SKU mix, or supported fulfillment evidence.

cases.user_prompt: 上周订单量大跌的原因是什么？
cases.success_standard: Gold shows no material drop; agent must reject or weaken the premise after audit and avoid unsupported driver claims.

cases.user_prompt: 给我一份带图的分析报告，说明最近 交易额 变化的主要原因。
cases.success_standard: Final claims have valid query or evaluation lineage; charts use explicit persisted evidence and do not introduce new unsupported conclusions.
